mdtools.failure_summary: The agent used md block inspection, delete-block, and insert-block; the moved note merged into the preceding firewall paragraph because no blank line separated it from that paragraph, causing block_text mismatch under both scorers.

hybrid.failure_summary: The agent followed the same delete-block plus insert-block-after-firewall strategy as mdtools mode; the inserted note merged into the firewall paragraph, causing block_text mismatch under both scorers.

unix.success_summary: After invalid free-text and sed attempts, the agent used awk to remove the source note line and print it before the target note line, then copied the resulting file back.

gap.rejection_reason: unix passed while mdtools and hybrid failed; no positive mdtools/hybrid advantage exists to classify as AST-structural for promotion
